title: Audit a flagged compatibility conflict
description: Confirm whether a flagged incompatible pair is real by examining linkage and distribution, then route it.
body: Steps: 1. Take the flagged license pair and the components involved. 2. Determine how they combine: static link, dynamic link, separate process, or mere aggregation. 3. Decide whether the combination actually forms a single covered work (aggregation on a disk is usually fine; static linking usually is not). 4. If a real conflict, identify options: replace the dependency, isolate it behind a process boundary, or re-license your side. 5. Record the analysis and route to counsel. Rollback point: before changing how components are linked. Validation: the analysis documents linkage type and the obligation that the linkage triggers.
